metadata.meta_description: Aerial robotics is now a mature and well-established research field, built over several decades of scientific and technological progress. In parallel, many applications of unmanned aerial vehicles — commonly referred to as drones — are progressively reaching industrial maturity, with increasing deployment in inspection, monitoring, mapping, logistics, agriculture, emergency response, and other domains.
